description: An exploration of the Nature Area's flora and fauna – anything can happen! Our walk will discover what is occurring out in the park throughout the year--all dependent on the season of your program.

program_name: Farm Tour (Year-round except for the month of May)
description: Meet the animals at the Tilden Little Farm and learn the importance of agriculture in our daily lives. *Have more than 2 classes? We provide Farm Stations for 2-4 classes.

description: Students will learn about Native People, their connection to the land and natural resources, and traditional skills used by the Ohlone today. Program includes hands-on activities and time outdoors.

metadata.title: Ohlone Culture Program | Tilden Environmental Education Center | East Bay Regional Park District
